data.body: Implement Foolery overview changes: render user-visible Beat.labels as compact tags on overview tiles; add overview controls for filtering by one or more tags and by one or more setlists; combine tag and setlist filters so either category can be used alone or together; populate setlist options from plan summaries and label each option as '<knot id> <first 40 chars of title/summary>'; use plan beatIds for membership matching by id or alias; keep all files under repo size limits; cover helper behavior and component rendering with focused tests.
data.title: Implement overview tags and filters
